description: Links publicly reported extreme periods to AOI ids in corridor_metadata.json. Sentinel-2 is only appropriate for sunlit seasons; winter storms need SAR/reanalysis/stations.

events.title: Severe Kivalliq storm period (Rankin Inlet winds; Arviat power emergency)
events.interpretation_note: Late November: limited daylight and storm cloud; optical change maps are not a meaningful test of blizzard damage. Use ERA5 wind/precip, news, and utility outage timelines; consider Sentinel-1 if you add SAR.

events.title: Widespread July 2022 temperature records across Nunavut (High Arctic + many communities)
Anomalously warm spring 2023 — snow/ice melt context (reanalysis; compare to case study)
Record Arctic cyclone — sea ice pack (not community trail AOI)
events.interpretation_note: Science focus on ice-ocean waves and microwave ice; no AOI in this repo targets that event.
